data.title: Global New Material Prepares for Key Acquisition Approval Meeting
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

Global New Material International Holdings Limited ( (HK:6616) ) has issued an update.

Global New Material International Holdings Limited has announced the closure of its register of members in preparation for an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled for January 5, 2026. This meeting will address the approval of the Acquisition, Chesir Pearl Minority Interest Purchase Agreement, and related transactions. The closure period for the register is from December 30, 2025, to January 5, 2026, during which no share transfers will be registered, ensuring only eligible shareholders can vote at the EGM.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6616) stock is a Buy with a HK$8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Global New Material International Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:6616 Stock Forecast page.

More about Global New Material International Holdings Limited

Global New Material International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, focusing on the acquisition and management of materials-related businesses.

Current Market Cap: HK$11.52B

data.title: Valterra Platinum Achieves Investment Grade Rating from S&P Global
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

Valterra Platinum Limited ( (AGPPF) ) has provided an announcement.

Valterra Platinum Limited has been assigned a long-term foreign and local currency issuer credit rating of BBB- and a short-term credit rating of A-3 by S&P Global Ratings, along with a South Africa national scale rating of zaAAA, all with a stable outlook. This investment grade rating reflects the company’s strong balance sheet and robust cash flow generation, supported by high-quality assets and disciplined capital allocation, which positions it favorably within the platinum group metals industry.

More about Valterra Platinum Limited

Valterra Platinum Limited is a leading global producer of platinum group metals (PGMs), with primary operations in South Africa and Zimbabwe. The company is listed on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange and the London Stock Exchange, and it operates a fully integrated value chain from mining to refining, supported by marketing hubs in London, Singapore, and Shanghai. Valterra Platinum focuses on sustainability, community impact, and delivering superior returns to shareholders.

Find detailed analytics on AGPPF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Southern Alliance Mining Ltd. ( (SG:QNS) ) just unveiled an update.

Southern Alliance Mining Ltd. announced its financial disclosures for the first quarter ending October 31, 2025, in accordance with the Singapore Exchange’s Catalist Rules. The company reported a slight variance in its projected and actual expenditures for mine exploration and evaluation, as well as mining-related activities. The adoption of underground mining techniques at the Chaah Mine marks a significant operational shift, aligning with the company’s commitment to responsible mining practices.

More about Southern Alliance Mining Ltd.

Southern Alliance Mining Ltd. is a company incorporated in Singapore, operating in the mineral, oil, and gas industry. The company focuses on mining activities, particularly in the exploration and extraction of ores, with a recent shift to underground mining techniques at their Chaah Mine.

Minmetals Land Limited ( (HK:0230) ) has issued an announcement.

Minmetals Land Limited and June Glory International Limited have announced a proposal for the privatization of Minmetals Land Limited through a scheme of arrangement under Section 99 of the Companies Act, along with a proposed withdrawal of its listing. The companies have received consent to extend the deadline for dispatching the Scheme Document to January 20, 2026, as they finalize the necessary information. Stakeholders are advised to exercise caution, as the proposal’s implementation is contingent upon fulfilling certain conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0230) stock is a Hold with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Minmetals Land Limited stock, see the HK:0230 Stock Forecast page.

An announcement from Burberry ( (GB:BRBY) ) is now available.

Burberry Group PLC announced changes in the shareholdings of its directors and persons discharging managerial responsibilities. On December 11, 2025, CEO Joshua Schulman and CFO Kate Ferry were each granted 41 ordinary shares at no cost under the company’s Share Incentive Plan. This move is part of Burberry’s ongoing efforts to align the interests of its leadership with those of its shareholders, potentially impacting the company’s operational strategies and stakeholder relations.

data.title: Future Generation Global Reports Strong 12-Month Performance Despite November Dip
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium and Invest with Confidence

  • Unlock hedge-fund level data and powerful investing tools designed to help you make smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis so your portfolio is always positioned for maximum potential

An announcement from Future Generation Global Limited ( (AU:FGG) ) is now available.

Future Generation Global Limited reported a 0.6% decrease in its investment portfolio for November, compared to a 0.2% decrease in the MSCI AC World Index (AUD). Despite this, the company’s 12-month portfolio performance remains strong at 12.9%, with a since-inception annual increase of 10.0%. The company has achieved this performance with lower volatility compared to the MSCI AC World Index. Additionally, FGG paid a fully franked interim dividend of 4.0 cents per share in November, reflecting its commitment to providing returns to shareholders.

More about Future Generation Global Limited

Future Generation Global Limited (ASX: FGG) is a diversified global investment company that manages a portfolio of 16 actively managed funds with over 1,900 underlying securities across various sectors and companies. The company focuses on small and mid-cap companies, with a regional exposure that is underweight in America and overweight in Europe. FGG also supports the Live4Life program, which is dedicated to youth suicide prevention in rural and regional communities.

Average Trading Volume: 279,973

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
